title: Manager - M&A (Merger & Acquisitions) HSW
description:
Job summary:

  • Leading end-to-end M&A transaction execution, from origination and deal evaluation to negotiation and completion. The role encompasses business development, financial and industry analysis, preparation of transaction materials, due diligence coordination, and client relationship management.
  • This position also provides a strong leadership pathway. The incumbent will have the opportunity to eventually lead the M&A department and contribute directly to shaping and driving the growth of the M&A practice, which is a critical strategic pillar of the firm. The role offers significant visibility to senior management and substantial involvement in the firm’s long-term expansion plans.

Responsibilities:

Deal Origination & Business Development

  • Identify, assess, and pursue potential M&A opportunities across Singapore and the region.
  • Develop and maintain networks with corporate clients, investors, intermediaries, and industry stakeholders.
  • Prepare and pitch proposals and marketing materials to support new business acquisition.

Industry & Financial Analysis

  • Conduct in-depth industry and market research to assess sector dynamics, competitive landscape, and investment themes.
  • Perform financial modelling, valuation analyses (DCF, comparable companies, precedent transactions), and scenario evaluations.
  • Prepare clear, data-driven insights and recommendation papers for senior management and clients.

Transaction Execution

  • Lead and coordinate the full execution of M&A transactions, including structuring, negotiation, documentation, and closing activities.
  • Prepare key transaction deliverables, including Information Memoranda, management presentations, teasers, valuation reports, and internal approval materials.
  • Manage and oversee due diligence processes, ensuring smooth coordination among clients, auditors, legal counsel, and other advisors.
  • Monitor timelines, manage transaction workstreams, and ensure deliverables meet professional and regulatory standards.

Client & Stakeholder Management

  • Serve as the day-to-day contact point for clients, providing strategic guidance, project updates, and issue resolution.
  • Build strong, trusted relationships with clients to understand their objectives, challenges, and long-term strategic goals.
  • Work collaboratively with internal teams and external advisors to ensure seamless project delivery.

Internal Leadership & Collaboration

  • Mentor and guide junior team members on analytical work, deal processes, and professional standards.
  • Contribute to knowledge development, best practices, and internal process improvements within the M&A team.
  • Support management in developing the M&A practice, including thought leadership, marketing efforts, and capability enhancement.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Accountancy, Business, Finance, Economics, or related discipline.
  • Professional qualifications (e.g., CFA, CA, CPA) would be an advantage but not mandatory.
  • 3–5 years of hands-on experience executing M&A transactions in Singapore and/or the region.
  • Strong exposure to financial modelling, valuation, due diligence, and transaction documentation.
  • Experience managing multi-party deal processes is preferred.
  • Strong analytical and financial modelling skills with attention to detail and accuracy.
  • Excellent project management capability with ability to prioritise and meet tight timelines.
  • Proactive, self-driven, responsible, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, and stakeholder-management skills.
  • Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment.
  • Business development mindset and confidence in engaging senior stakeholders.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website

www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
